options.name: -category
options.description: Specifies the category of paths to write to the text file

options.name: -format
options.description: Formats the report according to the specified column name and its width. Multiple column names can be specified. {{column1 width1} {column2 width2} ...}

options.name: -mtarpt
options.description: Specifies the name of the .mtarpt file to read and convert to a text file.

options.name: -path_specification
options.description: Writes a single number or path range separated by blank space. A path range is two numbers separated by a minus - sign

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the name of the text output file

options.name: -summary
options.description: Formats the report according to the specified column name and its width. Multiple column names can be specified.
